code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut longest = ""
  mut longest_len = 0
  mut current = ""
  mut current_len = 0
  mut i = 0

  while i <= n
    mut at_end = false
    if i == n
      at_end = true
    else
      let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
      if is_ws(b)
        at_end = true
      else
        current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
        current_len = current_len + 1
      end
    end

    if at_end
      if current_len > longest_len
        longest = current
        longest_len = current_len
      end
      current = ""
      current_len = 0
    end

    i = i + 1
  end

  print("longest=#{longest}")
end
